# RFC 9116 compliant security.txt

Contact: info@strict-dev.com
Expires: 2027-02-19T00:00:00.000Z
Preferred-Languages: pt, en
Canonical: https://strict-dev.com/.well-known/security.txt

# Security Reporting
# If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it to:
# Email: info@strict-dev.com
# PGP Key: https://strict-dev.com/pgp-key.asc (if available)
